ExternalDatabaseInfo.CreateViewSql: select `summary`.`TARGET_YEAR_MONTH` AS `対象年月`,`m_hinban`.`DRIVE_KEISHIKI` AS `型式`,`summary`.`TO_ZENZAN` AS `前残`,`summary`.`TO_SHIIRE` AS `当月度入荷`,(((`summary`.`TO_URIAGE_YUSHOSHIKYU` + `summary`.`TO_MUSYOSHIKYU`) + `summary`.`TO_BANAI_KURADASHI`) + `summary`.`TO_SONOTA_KURADASHI`) AS `当月度出荷`,((`summary`.`TO_ZENZAN` + `summary`.`TO_SHIIRE`) - (((`summary`.`TO_URIAGE_YUSHOSHIKYU` + `summary`.`TO_MUSYOSHIKYU`) + `summary`.`TO_BANAI_KURADASHI`) + `summary`.`TO_SONOTA_KURADASHI`)) AS `繰越残`,(select `tukebarai`.`UKEBARAI_DATE` from `tukebarai` where ((`tukebarai`.`HINBAN` = `summary`.`BUHIN_CODE`) and (`tukebarai`.`UKEBARAI_KUBUN` = 4) and (`tukebarai`.`UKEBARAI_DATE` < `summary`.`TARGET_YEAR_MONTH`)) order by `tukebarai`.`UKEBARAI_NBR` desc limit 1) AS `前残＿入荷日`,(select `h`.`KINGAKU` from (`tukebarai` `t` join `thatchum` `h` on((`t`.`DENPYO_NBR` = `h`.`DENPYO_NBR`))) where ((`t`.`HINBAN` = `summary`.`BUHIN_CODE`) and (`t`.`UKEBARAI_KUBUN` = 4) and (`t`.`UKEBARAI_DATE` < `summary`.`TARGET_YEAR_MONTH`)) order by `t`.`UKEBARAI_NBR` desc limit 1) AS `前残＿価格`,(select `tukebarai`.`UKEBARAI_DATE` from `tukebarai` where ((`tukebarai`.`HINBAN` = `summary`.`BUHIN_CODE`) and (`tukebarai`.`UKEBARAI_KUBUN` = 4) and (date_format(`tukebarai`.`UKEBARAI_DATE`,'%Y/%m') = date_format(`summary`.`TARGET_YEAR_MONTH`,'%Y/%m'))) order by `tukebarai`.`UKEBARAI_NBR` desc limit 1) AS `当月度入荷＿入荷日`,(select `h`.`KINGAKU` from (`tukebarai` `t` join `thatchum` `h` on((`t`.`DENPYO_NBR` = `h`.`DENPYO_NBR`))) where ((`t`.`HINBAN` = `summary`.`BUHIN_CODE`) and (`t`.`UKEBARAI_KUBUN` = 4) and (date_format(`t`.`UKEBARAI_DATE`,'%Y/%m') = date_format(`summary`.`TARGET_YEAR_MONTH`,'%Y/%m'))) order by `t`.`UKEBARAI_NBR` desc limit 1) AS `当月度入荷＿価格`,(select `tukebarai`.`UKEBARAI_DATE` from `tukebarai` where ((`tukebarai`.`HINBAN` = `summary`.`BUHIN_CODE`) and (`tukebarai`.`UKEBARAI_KUBUN` = 5) and (date_format(`tukebarai`.`UKEBARAI_DATE`,'%Y/%m') = date_format(`summary`.`TARGET_YEAR_MONTH`,'%Y/%m'))) order by `tukebarai`.`UKEBARAI_NBR` desc limit 1) AS `当月度出荷＿出荷日`,(select `j`.`TEHAI_KOBAN` from (`tukebarai` `t` join `tjuchu` `j` on((`t`.`JUCHU_NBR` = `j`.`JUCHU_NBR`))) where ((`t`.`HINBAN` = `summary`.`BUHIN_CODE`) and (`t`.`UKEBARAI_KUBUN` = 5) and (date_format(`t`.`UKEBARAI_DATE`,'%Y/%m') = date_format(`summary`.`TARGET_YEAR_MONTH`,'%Y/%m'))) order by `t`.`UKEBARAI_NBR` desc limit 1) AS `当月度出荷＿工事№`,-((select `b`.`KURADASHI_KOTEI` from ((`tukebarai` `t` join `thatchum` `h` on((`t`.`DENPYO_NBR` = `h`.`DENPYO_NBR`))) join `tbuhink` `b` on((`h`.`BUHIN_KOSEI_ID` = `b`.`ID`))) where ((`t`.`HINBAN` = `summary`.`BUHIN_CODE`) and (`t`.`UKEBARAI_KUBUN` = 5) and (date_format(`t`.`UKEBARAI_DATE`,'%Y/%m') = date_format(`summary`.`TARGET_YEAR_MONTH`,'%Y/%m'))) order by `t`.`UKEBARAI_NBR` desc limit 1)) AS `当月度出荷＿倉工`,`summary`.`TO_TOZAN` AS `繰越残＿価格`,0 AS `型式計`,0 AS `エンジン計` from (`tkansayo_zaiko_summary` `summary` join `mhinban` `m_hinban` on((`summary`.`BUHIN_CODE` = `m_hinban`.`HINBAN`))) where (`m_hinban`.`ZAISHITSU` like '%DRIVE%')
